tweets.text: I think a lot of crypto people now getting into physical TCG collecting will be a good thing. tweets.author: CozomoMedici
tweets.text:
173 years ago today, Vincent van Gogh was born.

At age 37, he put a gun to his chest and pulled the trigger.

He died having only sold a few paintings.

Today his art sells for millions & is in museums all around the world. https://t.co/0o5qUKYPcD

tweets.author: madebyoona
tweets.text: this is an image from the Dear David solo show - and i know how we cringe at chords in the digital art space, but for this one. it felt right to have them exposed. systems connected.

tweets.author: madebyoona
tweets.text:
@postanika @_second_guess and i had fun taping all these up 

but even more fun inviting people like @BorisEldagsen at the opening

tweets.author: madebyoona
tweets.text:
Dear David: A Surveillance Love Story 
the first Dear David solo show. 

the exhibition was designed to let people get involved themselves.

i printed out all my emails with David, manually redacting our names. there was proof of flirting. 

i called it my stalker wall. https://t.co/xu6Cqwgz6j

tweets.author: madebyoona
tweets.text: surveillance is a networked system. https://t.co/zKy1JWm6tk
